_comment: Order aggregate lifecycle (states = OrderStatus; events = Order actions). PLACEMENT (ARCHITECTURE.md section 4): a row in the Order DB with a status column, optimistic lock per row; every mutation persists in one transaction together with its outbox event (the transactional outbox). Saga-emitted events (markReserved, markPaid, markShipped, fail) arrive over the bus at least once; the consumer dedupes by message id BEFORE the machine sees the event, so a redelivered event that still reaches the machine is stale by state, and the _ignores entries say what stale means per state. Out-of-order events are nacked (ignored here) and redelivered by the bus until the preceding event lands.

_delays.persistTimeout: 5000 ms - Order DB write timeout (ARCHITECTURE.md section 3, per-service DB posture)
_delays.persistRetryBackoff: 500 ms - transient DB unavailability or optimistic-lock conflict; retriesExhausted at 3

_ignores.markReserved: the saga starts only after confirm; stale or out-of-order saga event, nack for redelivery
_ignores.markPaid: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery after markReserved lands
_ignores.markShipped: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery
_ignores.markDelivered: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery
_ignores.fail: the saga cannot fail an order it has not started; stale event

_ignores.markPaid: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery after markReserved lands
_ignores.markShipped: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery
_ignores.markDelivered: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery

_ignores.markShipped: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery after markPaid lands
_ignores.markDelivered: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery
_ignores.cancel: past the cancellation point; cancellation now flows through the saga's compensation as fail

_ignores.markDelivered: out-of-order saga event; nack for redelivery after markShipped lands
_ignores.cancel: past the cancellation point; cancellation now flows through the saga's compensation as fail
shipped orders cannot be cancelled; a lost parcel arrives as fail (Shipment Lost)

rolledBack._exhaustive: priorStatus is set by every setPending* action to the current domain state; only Pending, Confirmed, Reserved, Paid, and Shipped have transitions into the persist overlay (final states persist nothing), and all five priorIs* guards are present
